title: rosa rubiginosa var. globosa
intro: Rosa rubiginosa var. globosa, also known as the sweetbriar rose or globular sweetbriar, is a fragrant and flowering plant species within the Rosa genus. The medicinal properties of Rosa rubiginosa var. globosa include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Rosa rubiginosa var. globosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
